ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MITHRIX_ANCIENT.title: Mithrix
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MITHRIX_ANCIENT.talk.AN: We meet again. Take my blessing and go, vermin.
Tireless, you are. It will not matter.
Ah, another pest has arrived to claim a treasure.
Take this, vermin, and embrace design.
Another vermin? Take a bauble, and be on your way.
Your spirit will crumble eventually. Until then, claim your boon, vermin.
I see you still fight relentlessly. Perhaps I should simply strike you down myself. It would be mercy.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MITHRIX_ANCIENT.talk.IR: Cease your struggling and take a boon, wretch.
Vermin, why do you persist on this quest?
Slay the Architect? How foolish. You remind me of my brother.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MITHRIX_ANCIENT.talk.SI: Another vermin to climb the spire?
No rude remarks? You are more tolerable than the other vermin.
You persist despite being so frail and weak?
Take your baubles and trinkets, vermin. You will shatter soon enough.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MITHRIX_ANCIENT.talk.RE: Such eccentric garbs for a mere vermin.
Vermin!? You disrespect the heir to the Throne of Stars!
I should smite you where you stand, but I will show you mercy! Offer to me a gift and I will be on my way!
If it will silence you, then so be it.
The king of the vermin returns.
Insolent fool! Have you any idea who I am?
An ignorant pest who doesn't know their place.
If I am a mere pest to you, then face me!
You aren't worth my time, vermin. Take a treasure and begone.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MITHRIX_ANCIENT.talk.NE: Blood and soul course through your essence. What have you done, conjurer?
Revenge for my family. He will pay for what he's done.
Do not regret this journey, being of memories.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MITHRIX_ANCIENT.talk.DE: Take your boon and begone from here, wretch.
What manner of sculptor created you, construct?
The Architect? I see. So this is your business with them.
Perhaps not all constructs of soul are as vile as the Guardian once was.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-LESHY_ANCIENT.talk.firs: You are welcome to take one of my relics, but first, how about a round of cards?
Welcome back. Would you care to play a round?
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-LESHY_ANCIENT.talk.IRON: Soldier, rest your blade. How about a warm drink?
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-LESHY_ANCIENT.talk.SILE: [i][font_size=22]Leshy eyes the Silent, gesturing to the open chair.[/font_size][/i]
[i][font_size=22]The Silent sits, partaking in a game with them.[/font_size][/i]
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-LESHY_ANCIENT.talk.REGE: Ancient of the forest, I come seeking a blessing!
Of course, your majesty, but perhaps you may bless me with a round of cards before you go?
If that is what you desire, then so shall it be! But do hurry, I have important matters to attend to.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-LESHY_ANCIENT.talk.NECR: Good evening. Would you care to play a game?
I'm sorry, I don't have time right now. Perhaps next time?
It is alright. I can wait. I have nothing but time.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-LESHY_ANCIENT.talk.DEFE: Are you one of his creations?
Hmm...no, too respectful. Please, take a relic, and continue your climb.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SEBASTIAN_ANCIENT.title: Sebastian
Welcome, welcome! Care to pick up one of these... "loose assets" I've found?~
Oh hey! Check it, I was going around the Hive, lots of goodies. I found your body, and some of your relics were still intact!
Continue
Hey, don't worry about it, you can have them back....for a price~
Glad to see you're still kicking. Care for a relic?~
Ahh, welcome back.
Can we keep things short today? I have a meeting soon.
Another round? Alright, take your pick then.
Here to buy? I'm sure I have something you'll like~
Yeah, yeah, just pick somethin'. And keep the noise down, would ya..
Hm? Oh, hello. Wares are over there, take what you'd like.
Surely that armor's gotta be heavy. Have you ever taken it off?
Continue
[i][font_size=22]The Ironclad shakes their head.[/font_size][/i]
Continue
Heh, bet that sucks. Maybe you should relax a little more.
Say, what's a huntress like you doing in a place like this?
Say nothing.
Continue
...yeesh, alright. Just take something and go, then.
You there, giant fish! Where is the ancient of this layer?
Continue
...excuse me? I [i]am[/i] the ancient here. Have some respect.
Scoff
You? An ancient? How disappointing. Reward me so I may be on my way!
Continue
[i][font_size=22]Sebastian grumbles quietly and sets a few items in front of you.[/font_size][/i]
Ah, another climber passes my shop. What can I do for you?
Talk
Do you have anything that can kill the architect?
Continue
Oh I'm sure I've got something that'll suit your needs~
Hmm? My, aren't you a rebellious little construct~
Reply
[i][font_size=22]<beep boop?>[/font_size][/i]
Continue
Fix you? Fix your friend? Why, for such a cute little robot he should do that! Get out there and beat him up!
Reply
[i][font_size=22]<energetic beeps!>[/font_size][/i]
